name: Kick off an IronEdit edit job (post-Resolve-Studio)
description: Once DaVinci Resolve Studio is installed and DaVinci MCP is wired (Phase 2 of IronEdit), Jed asks Solomon to start an edit on a clip. Solomon calls iron_edit_start with the clip path + instruction.
trigger_examples: iron edit on D:\\RawFootage\\jobsite001.mp4 — trim silence and cut to 60 sec
start an ironedit job on the latest clip
edit that footage with ironedit, tight cut
prompt_template: Call executeTool('iron_edit_start', { clip_path: {{clip_path}}, instruction: {{instruction}} }). Solomon should immediately Telegram-confirm 'Job queued — render typically 3-8 min, I'll ping when done.'
escalation_conditions: iron_edit_start tool not yet wired (Phase 2 of IronEdit) — escalate with status update
Resolve Studio not installed on Jed's PC

smoke_test.trigger_message: ironedit on D:\\RawFootage\\jobsite001.mp4 — trim silence and cut to 60 sec

notes: PLACEHOLDER — iron_edit_start tool doesn't exist yet. Template is staged for the day Resolve Studio is purchased and IronEdit Phase 2 ships. Until then this template's smoke test will surface the gap.
